_comment: Triaged advisories accepted as not actionable (already mitigated by overrides/resolutions in package.json, false positive against patched version, or non-applicable Windows-only / dev-only attack surface). REMOVE an entry from this list only after confirming the underlying package has shipped a real patch AND your overrides resolve to that patched version. Add new entries by their GHSA / CVE id, with a one-line reason.

ignore.reason: @babel/core arbitrary file read via sourceMappingURL — dev/build-time only, source is trusted repo code; not exploitable in Worker runtime.
elliptic risky primitive — used transitively by build/signing tooling; production signing uses Web Crypto (ECDSA P-521). No user-supplied input reaches elliptic at runtime.
esbuild Windows-only dev server file read — builds run on Linux CI/Workers; dev server never exposed publicly.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
ws ≥8.18.0 pinned via overrides — OSV range may overlap older nested copies; rebuild verifies no exploitable path.
ws ≥8.18.0 pinned via overrides.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
dompurify ≥3.2.7 pinned via overrides.
undici ≥7.16.0 pinned via overrides.
protobufjs ≥7.5.4 pinned via overrides.
vite advisory is Windows-only path bypass; build runs on Linux Workers.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
js-yaml ≥4.1.1 pinned via overrides.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
brace-expansion ≥2.0.2 pinned via overrides.
undici ≥7.16.0 pinned via overrides.
undici ≥7.16.0 pinned via overrides.
launch-editor Windows NTLM hash disclosure — dev-only, Windows-only; builds on Linux.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
undici SOCKS5 ProxyAgent — no SOCKS5 proxy used in Worker runtime; not exploitable in our deployment.
baseline: triaged 2026-06-24 — present at scan-bootstrap time; review on next bump.
undici WebSocket client — not used in Workers SSR path; review next undici bump.
uuid ≥11.1.0 pinned via overrides; nested copies under firebase/google-auth-library are inert.

react-router RSC Mode CSRF — the app uses createBrowserRouter (classic SPA data router) in LegacyApp and TanStack Router for SSR; React Server Components mode is not used anywhere, so the pre-400 action-execution path is unreachable. No 7.x patch exists (fixed only in 8.3.0); re-review at the react-router 8 migration.

js-yaml 5.2.2 (fix) is younger than the registry's 24h minimum-release-age policy and cannot be pinned yet; js-yaml is used for trusted build-time config only, no untrusted YAML is parsed at runtime. Bump to ^5.2.2 once the release ages out.
